summary: Feature fully implemented prior to this epic. All 5 functional requirements and all integration points verified present and correct in production code.
key_findings: FluxInferenceEngine.generate() implements rounding (((dim+15)//16)*16) and center cropping
GenerationResult and BufferedImage both have optional generated_width/generated_height fields
Worker propagates generated dimensions from GenerationResult to BufferedImage
Backend._save_with_metadata() stores GeneratedWidth/GeneratedHeight in PNG tEXt chunks
Frontend parses, stores, and displays both generated and final dimensions
HTML already has Generated Size and Final Size rows in metadata panel
TypeScript types already include generatedWidth? and generatedHeight? in ImageRecord

test_coverage.test_execution_note: Tests require torch which is not installed in CI environment. 68 worker/buffer tests pass. 129 TypeScript tests pass.
